---
title: "Presented Poster at Princeton Machine Learning Theory Summer School"
date: "2025-08-01"
categories: [workshops, posters]
description: "Attended the summer school at Princeton and presented a poster."
---
I was funded to attend the Princeton Machine Learning Theory Summer School. During the program, I presented my poster: *Computing Empirical Barycenters on Unknown Wasserstein Submanifolds*.
